category_sources: source_facts.description says auto-complete program for D; GitHub README describes DCD as the D Completion Daemon for the D programming language.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is dlang-community/DCD and README expands it as D Completion Daemon; source_facts.name is dcd.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents architecture, build, sockets, client commands, server configuration, and editor-oriented usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dlang-community/DCD; per instructions repo was not rechecked.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists dcd-client and dcd-server; GitHub README documents autocomplete, call tips, symbol lookup, and editor integration for D.
